get.description: Retrieves a warehouse by its ID

get.description: Retrieves all notifications
Returns all media records with metadata (url, type, alt_text, created_at, is_active). Includes both active and inactive records.

post.description: Upload image, video, or document. Returns JSON with url, type, and alt_text. Supports images (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG), videos (MP4, WebM, OGG), and documents (PDF, DOC, DOCX).

parameters.name: alt_text
parameters.description: Optional alt text for the media

file.description: File to upload (image, video, or document)

400.description: Invalid file type or size exceeds limit

Retrieves all banners for admin management

patch.description: Activates a user account - restricted to ADMIN and SUPER_ADMIN roles

403.description: Access denied - requires ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN role

patch.description: Updates the is_active flag for a media record by URL.

schema.description: JSON body with url and is_active

404.description: Media not found with the given URL
